title: Minecraft Relived
description: Brings back nostalgia and makes you feel like playing for the first time all over again!
body:
This modpack aims to bring back the nostalgia of every player's first time playing Minecraft. Additions and small changes to the game create a sense of newness, enhancing the immersive experience.

### Terrain Generation
The overworld, nether and end terrain generation has been completely overhauled and various new structures such as dungeons, improved villages or temples add a challenging gameplay aspect.

### Visual Improvements
The visual appeal has been greatly improved with various texture packs and shaders, as well as tweaks to the UI and more customizability.

### Additions to the Game
To give the player a fresh yet nostalgic feeling, small additions have been made in the form of new tools and armor, all while retaining the vanilla vibe.
